# Pull Requests Policy

Thank you for your interest!

This repository is published **as-is** under the **GNU General Public License,
version 2 or later**.

- We do **not** provide support.
- We do **not** accept issues.
- Pull requests are **not accepted from the public**.

Only collaborators who have been explicitly added to this repository may open
pull requests. If you are not a collaborator, please fork this project and
continue development there — the GPL explicitly grants you that right.

To avoid confusion, we kindly ask redistributors of modified versions to use a
**different project name and branding**.

## Why This Policy?

Untracked is a personal project. It depends on two private, undocumented files —
Toggl Track's local Core Data store and macOS's Do Not Disturb assertions
database — either of which can change without notice. Supporting every
combination of Toggl version and macOS release is beyond its scope.

---

> ⚠️ Non-collaborator pull requests will be automatically closed by a bot.
